name: Gangle - Zooble's Update
description:
"Oh dear..."

So... the censorship of the Circus has been lifted after Caine decided he was too busy to put up with Zooble's complaints. Now the Circus characters have the option to get closer in... a more physical way. And Gangle in particular now has a whole new world of fantasy.
